ships.title: Hierarchy view improvements and file uploads in issue forms
ships.description: Issue forms now support file uploads, and the hierarchy view for sub-issues has been improved with better navigation and visibility.

ships.title: Improved search on the issues dashboard
ships.description: The issues dashboard search now supports more filters and delivers faster, more relevant results.

ships.title: GitHub Copilot CLI is now generally available
ships.description: Copilot CLI brings AI-powered coding assistance directly to your terminal with agentic capabilities and MCP extensibility.

ships.title: Access all pull request comments without leaving the Files Changed page
ships.description: View and navigate all PR comments inline on the Files Changed page without switching tabs.

ships.title: New repository settings for configuring pull request access
ships.description: Maintainers can now configure who has access to create and manage pull requests directly from repository settings.

ships.title: GitHub agentic workflows are now in technical preview
ships.description: Agentic workflows let AI agents autonomously plan, execute, and iterate on tasks across your repositories.

ships.title: Improved pull request Files Changed page
ships.description: The Files Changed experience has been redesigned with better performance, navigation, and review tools.

ships.title: Pinned comments on GitHub Issues
ships.description: Maintainers can now pin important comments to the top of an issue for better visibility and context.

ships.title: Faster loading for GitHub Issues
ships.description: Issues now load significantly faster with improved rendering and data fetching.
